title: Dev-UI Primitives & Migration — Standardize Dev Setup CSS
scope: Establish a single generic dev-only stylesheet (dev/styles/dev-ui.css) that defines page-agnostic primitives — dev-page, dev-panel, dev-table, dev-toolbar, dev-search, dev-pager, dev-toc, dev-accordion, dev-doc, dev-meta, dev-pill, dev-heat, dev-form, dev-empty, dev-loading — used by every dev page (Research, Reports, Plans, Retros, Page Help, Shortcuts, Library). Migrate all existing page-prefixed classes (dev-research-*, dev-reports-*, dev-plans-*, ui-retro__*, dev-help-editor*, dev-shortcuts-th--*, dev-library__*, r-toc*) onto these primitives. Evict all dev-only CSS from app/globals.css (the Vector application stylesheet must contain zero dev classes). Rewire every skill/command (/research, <addpaper>, <r>/<retro>, <memory>, <shortcuts>, <makedevapp>) so their generated dev surfaces reference the catalog primitives only — never invent new classes. Add a CI lint rule (npm run lint:dev-css) that fails if any dev-* or ui-retro__* selector reappears in app/globals.css.
value: One table primitive, one panel primitive, one TOC primitive, one accordion primitive — for every dev page now and for every dev page added by future shortcuts. Eliminates per-page CSS drift, prevents skills from inventing classes, and confines the Vector application stylesheet to user-facing app surfaces. Every future dev page is built from the same parts; reviewers stop relearning each panel; visual changes to the dev surface are a one-file edit.
implementation_plan: Survey current state: catalog every page-prefixed class in dev/pages/*.tsx and confirm the bleed locations in app/globals.css (lines 11263–11569 for ui-retro__*, lines 4579–4582 for dev-shortcuts-th--*).
Define dev/styles/dev-ui.css with the 14 primitive families. Same declarations as the existing page-prefixed rules so visual diff is zero.
Add 'UI Catalog' tab to /dev that previews one example of every primitive — review surface for visual regressions.
Migrate panels in this order: Research (proof of concept) → Reports → Plans → Retros (largest, requires global eviction) → Page Help → Shortcuts → Library.
After Retros migrates, delete the ui-retro__* block from app/globals.css. After Shortcuts migrates, delete dev-shortcuts-th--* from app/globals.css.
Add lint:dev-css script (dev/scripts/check-no-dev-classes-in-globals.py) and CI gate. Doc in docs/c_c_lint_rules.md.
Update skill/command specs (retro, research, addpaper, memory, shortcuts, makedevapp) to reference the dev-ui catalog by name and forbid class invention.
Author docs/c_c_dev_ui_primitives.md as the catalog reference. Add HARD RULE to .claude/CLAUDE.md and pointer in docs/css-guide.md.
areas_impacted: DEV: dev/styles/dev-ui.css (new), dev/styles/dev.css (becomes shim), all dev/pages/*.tsx panels
UI: app/globals.css — REMOVE ui-retro__* (lines 11263–11569) and dev-shortcuts-th--* (lines 4579–4582)
feature_list: dev/styles/dev-ui.css — single source of truth for dev-setup CSS
dev-page / dev-page__header / dev-page__title / dev-page__subtitle / dev-page__body — page shell
dev-table / dev-table__head / dev-table__row / dev-table__cell + variants --num/--badge/--detail + dev-table-wrap + table modifiers --ledger/--hits/--whys/--wins
dev-accordion family (dev-namespace alias of existing accordion shape)
dev-toc-layout / dev-toc / dev-toc__label / dev-toc__list / dev-toc-body — replaces r-toc*
dev-doc / dev-doc__h2 / dev-doc__p / dev-doc__list / dev-doc__cmd / dev-doc__section
dev-meta / dev-meta__id / dev-meta__title / dev-meta__date / dev-meta__category / dev-meta__pills / dev-meta__pill
dev-heat / dev-heat--h1..h5 / dev-heat--w1..w5 — generic severity heatmap
lint:dev-css CI gate — forbids dev-* and ui-retro__* in app/globals.css
/dev → 'UI Catalog' tab — visual preview of every primitive
features_removed: ui-retro__* page-prefixed classes (entire family deleted from app/globals.css)

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Any table created within the dev setup area refers to a stylesheet under dev/styles/, not app/globals.css.
acceptance_criteria.proven_by: grep finds zero <table> markup inside dev/pages/**/*.tsx that resolves to a class defined in app/globals.css; lint:dev-css passes.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: All class names used by dev pages are generic dev-* primitives, never page-prefixed.
acceptance_criteria.proven_by: grep across dev/pages/*.tsx finds zero occurrences of dev-research-*, dev-reports-*, dev-plans-*, ui-retro__*, dev-help-editor*, dev-shortcuts-th--*, dev-library__*, r-toc* after migration.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: All shortcuts/skills that generate or paste markup into dev pages reference the dev-ui catalog and never invent classes.
acceptance_criteria.proven_by: Every file in .claude/skills/** and .claude/commands/** that emits HTML for /dev names only catalog primitives; review confirmed during Story 00405.
acceptance_criteria.done_note: Story 00405 review pass landed. HARD RULE blockquotes added to: c_research-paper-format.md, c_research.md, c_addpaper.md, c_write-research-paper.md, c_memory.md (commands); skills/retro/SKILL.md + c_retro.md heatmap class table rewritten to .dui-pill--h*/--w* with rendering-agnostic JSON note; c_make-dev-app.md adds explicit widget-vs-DevPage separation. c_addpaper-stories.md emits no HTML. stories/SKILL.md emits no HTML. Skills that don't emit /dev HTML (research/SKILL.md, theme, chart, writeweb) are out of scope.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: app/globals.css contains zero dev-* or ui-retro__* selectors after the migration.
acceptance_criteria.proven_by: npm run lint:dev-css exits 0; the lint script greps app/globals.css for selector prefixes 'dev-' and 'ui-retro__' and fails on hit.
acceptance_criteria.done_note: Confirmed 2026-05-05: grep -nE '^\s*\.dev-|^\s*\.ui-retro__' app/globals.css returns 0 matches; npm run lint:dev-css exits 0 with 'OK — app/globals.css clean of dev-*/dui-* selectors'.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Dev Research panel renders identically before and after migration.
acceptance_criteria.proven_by: Browser smoke at http://localhost:5101/dev → Research: visual diff zero, console clean, scroll-spy TOC works on accordion sections.
acceptance_criteria.done_note: Panel rewritten to compose only from .dui-* catalog. Mapping: dev-research-panel→dui-page; dev-research-header→dui-page__header + dui-page__title/subtitle; dev-research-toolbar→dui-toolbar (+__spacer); dev-research-search→dui-search; dev-research-pagesizes/-pagesize/--active→dui-pager__sizes/__size/.is-active; meta header→dui-meta + __id/__title/__sub/__summary; body→dui-doc; loading→dui-loading + __spinner; empty + error→dui-empty; pagination→dui-pager + __btn + __info. TOC scroll-spy selector now matches both .dui-toc__list a (new HTML) and .r-toc__list a (legacy research papers) so existing R### content keeps highlighting. tsc --noEmit clean. Visual smoke pending in user's browser session (interactive auth wall blocks headless SSR check).

acceptance_criteria.proven_by: Browser smoke: Reports tab renders, badges + scope pills visible, no console warnings.
acceptance_criteria.done_note: Panel rewritten to compose only from .dui-* catalog. Mapping: dev-reports-panel→dui-page; dev-reports-header→dui-page__header; dev-reports-empty + dev-alert→dui-empty; report header (scope/meta/pills)→dui-meta + __id/__title/__sub/__summary; SummaryPill + status badges→dui-pill + --pass/--warn/--fail/--fixed; <table className="table"> + table__row/__cell + dev-report-col--*/dev-report-row*→dui-table + dui-table__cell--shrink/--mono/--name/--muted; refresh button→dui-pager__btn. tsc --noEmit clean. Visual smoke pending in user's browser session.

acceptance_criteria.proven_by: Running `npm run lint:dev-css` exits 0 against current tree; new dui-form__* classes are recognised.

acceptance_criteria.proven_by: grep -rn 'dev-help-editor__' returns zero matches; component renders identically to before in /dev → Page Help tab.

acceptance_criteria.proven_by: Running `npm run lint:dev-css` exits 0 with zero remaining dev-* selectors in app/globals.css.

risks.risk: Renaming classes breaks visual regressions silently.
risks.mitigation: Define new primitives with identical declarations to the old page-prefixed rules; smoke-test each panel before deleting the old block; keep old definitions in dev.css as a temporary shim until each panel migration merges.

risks.risk: ui-retro__* in app/globals.css may be referenced by something outside dev/pages.
risks.mitigation: grep -rn 'ui-retro__' app/ backend/ before deletion; delete only after Retros panel migration is merged and audit confirms no out-of-scope users.

risks.risk: New skills authored before primitive catalog ships could introduce more drift.
risks.mitigation: Land Stories 00402 (catalog), 00403 (HARD RULE doc), 00404 (lint), 00405 (skill rewires) FIRST — before any panel migration — so the rule is in force before the surface area expands.

risks.risk: Legacy research papers may include rogue class names in their content HTML.
risks.mitigation: Whitelist a permissive descendant-selector style inside dev-doc so semantic tags render even if the body has unknown classes; lint warns rather than breaks.

references.label: Vector CSS guide (HARD RULE — catalog first, no inline styles)
